LanguageData.VTE_HaventExitedColonyForLongTime.stages: I haven't left home in a while, I'd really like to travel for a change.

LanguageData.VSIE_AttendedMyWedding.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} attended my wedding
LanguageData.VSIE_BingedDrug.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} binged on drugs. i don’t need a junkie in my life
LanguageData.VSIE_BingedFood.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} binged on food. how wasteful
{butcher_namedef} butchered my bonded pet {victim_namedef}, i will never forgive {butcher_objective}
LanguageData.VSIE_BrokeUpWithMe.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} broke up with me. will i ever find someone else?
LanguageData.VSIE_CuredMyFriend.stages.0.label: {secondpawn_namedef} cured my {0} {thirdpawn_namedef}, i will always be grateful to {secondpawn_objective}
LanguageData.VSIE_DidNotAttendWedding.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} didn't attend our wedding ceremony! was it so hard to come and just be with me on that day?
LanguageData.VSIE_ExposedCorpseOfMyFriendOpinion.stag: {otherpawn_namedef} dug up and exposed the corpse of my {0} {victim_namedef}, i will always despise {otherpawn_objective} for this
LanguageData.VSIE_FailedMedicalOperationAndKilled.sta: {otherpawn_namedef} failed a medical operation and killed one of us
LanguageData.VSIE_GotSomeLovin.stages.0.description: There's nothing like a tumble between the sheets to lift the mood.
LanguageData.VSIE_GotSomeLovin.stages.0.label: got some lovin'
LanguageData.VSIE_HasBeenMyFriendSinceChildhood.stage: {otherpawn_namedef} has been my friend since childhood, we have so much in common that no one can separate us
LanguageData.VSIE_HideInRoom.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} was hiding in {otherpawn_possessive} room. weirdo
LanguageData.VSIE_InducedPrisonerToEscape.stages.0.la: {otherpawn_namedef} broke our prisoners free. it could have ended very badly!
LanguageData.VSIE_IngestedHumanFlesh.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} ate human flesh, i will always be afraid of {otherpawn_possessive}
LanguageData.VSIE_InsultedMe.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} insulted me. words cut deeper than daggers
LanguageData.VSIE_IsRoyalty.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} is royalty. i’m impressed
LanguageData.VSIE_RanWild.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} ran wild. weirdo
LanguageData.VSIE_RebuffedMe.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} rebuffed me. i thought {otherpawn_pronoun} was the one
LanguageData.VSIE_RemovedPrisonersOrgans.stages.0.lab: {otherpawn_namedef} removed the prisoner's organs! how can a person be capable of such a thing?
LanguageData.VSIE_ResurrectedMe.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} resurrected me
LanguageData.VSIE_SavedMeFromMyWounds.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} saved me from my wounds. i will always be in {otherpawn_possessive} debt
LanguageData.VSIE_SavedMeFromRaiders.stages.0.label: {secondpawn_namedef} saved me from {thirdpawn_kinddef}, i will always be in {secondpawn_possessive} debt
LanguageData.VSIE_SlaughteredAnimalInRage.stages.0.la: {otherpawn_namedef} slaughtered our animal in a blind rage. i despise {otherpawn_objective}
LanguageData.VSIE_StoleMyLover.stages.0.label: {thirdpawn_namedef} stole {secondpawn_namedef} away from me. what makes {thirdpawn_objective} so much better?
LanguageData.VSIE_TamedMe.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} tamed me, i will always be glad of the wonders they've shown me
LanguageData.VSIE_TamedThrumbo.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} tamed a thrumbo. what a legendary feat!
LanguageData.VSIE_ThrewTantrum.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} threw a tantrum. {otherpawn_pronoun} needs to be taught some self control
LanguageData.VSIE_WanderedInSaddness.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} wandered in sadness. i feel pity for {otherpawn_objective}
LanguageData.VSIE_WasBadlyInjured.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} was badly injured in battle. i admire {otherpawn_possessive} courage
LanguageData.VSIE_WasPreviouslyOurEnemy.stages.0.labe: {otherpawn_namedef} was previously our enemy. i don't trust {otherpawn_objective}
LanguageData.VSIE_WeHadNiceChat.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} and i had a nice chat. it feels like we can talk about anything
LanguageData.VSIE_WeHadSocialFight.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} and i had a social fight
LanguageData.VSIE_WentBerserk.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} went berserk. i can never feel safe around {otherpawn_objective}
LanguageData.VSIE_WentIntoSadisticRage.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} went into sadistic rage. it’s absolutely disgusting
LanguageData.VSIE_WentOnFireStartingSpree.stages.0.la: {otherpawn_namedef} went on a fire starting spree. it was so close and everything we know would have turned to ash. how can i forgive that?
LanguageData.VSIE_WentOnMurderousRage.stages.0.label: {otherpawn_namedef} went on a murderous rage. what if i’m {otherpawn_possessive} next target?
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Demanded.stages.0.descriptio: I could use a drink. Something stronger please.
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Demanded.stages.0.label: missing alcohol
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Demanded.stages.1.descriptio: I wish I could have a drink of something stronger.
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Demanded.stages.1.label: no alcohol
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Demanded.stages.2.descriptio: I need a drink of something stronger.
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Demanded.stages.2.label: needs alcohol
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Demanded.stages.3.descriptio: I’d kill for a drop of something stronger.
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Demanded.stages.3.label: craves alcohol
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Demanded.stages.4.label: demands alcohol
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Desired.stages.0.description: It's been a while since I've had a drink.
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Desired.stages.0.label: missing alcohol
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Desired.stages.1.description: What this colony needs is a bar so we can take a few drinks with our friends after a day of hard work.
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Desired.stages.1.label: desiring a drink
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Desired.stages.2.description: Hard work is fine, but I'd really appreciate relaxing with some strong spirits or a beer.
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Desired.stages.2.label: wanting a drink
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Desired.stages.3.description: Hard work is fine, but I'd really appreciate relaxing with some strong spirits or a beer.
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Desired.stages.3.label: wanting a drink
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Desired.stages.4.description: Hard work is fine, but I'd really appreciate relaxing with some strong spirits or a beer.
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_Desired.stages.4.label: wanting a drink
LanguageData.VME_Alcohol_MildAbstinence.stages.0.desc: I drank a bit of alcohol. Not a big deal, but I feel a bit woozy.
LanguageData.VME_Aurora_Amazing.stages.0.description: I have a moment's respite from the darkness of the night.
LanguageData.VME_Aurora_Amazing.stages.0.label: amazing aurora
LanguageData.VME_Aurora_Despised.stages.0.description: The blinding lights in the heavens give me a headache.
LanguageData.VME_Aurora_Despised.stages.0.label: disgusting aurora
We use automated turrets. They are an incredible boon to our defenses.
LanguageData.VME_AutonomousWeapons_Exalted.stages.0.d: We use automated turrets. Automated defenses are key to a proper defense of what is ours.
I have a non-natural body part in me. Flesh only should be replaced by flesh!
LanguageData.VME_InstalledProsthetic_OnlyBiological.s: I had to install a non-natural prosthetic. Flesh only should be replaced by flesh.
LanguageData.VME_BookQuality_Desired.stages.0.descrip: Our colony has acquired a legendary book, how exciting.
LanguageData.VME_BookQuality_Desired.stages.0.label: legendary book in colony
LanguageData.VME_BookQuality_Desired.stages.1.descrip: Our colony has acquired two legendary books, how exciting.
LanguageData.VME_BookQuality_Desired.stages.1.label: some legendary books in colony
LanguageData.VME_BookQuality_Desired.stages.2.descrip: Our colony has acquired a few legendary books, we are building an amazing collection.
LanguageData.VME_BookQuality_Desired.stages.2.label: a few legendary books in colony
LanguageData.VME_BookQuality_Desired.stages.3.descrip: Our colony has acquired several legendary books, we are on our way to building an incredible library.
LanguageData.VME_BookQuality_Desired.stages.3.label: several legendary books in colony
LanguageData.VME_BookQuality_Desired.stages.4.descrip: We have amassed quite a lot of legendary literature!
LanguageData.VME_BookQuality_Desired.stages.4.label: many legendary books in colony
LanguageData.VME_BookReading_Desired.stages.0.descrip: Reading a good book is like nourishing the mind.
LanguageData.VME_BookReading_Desired.stages.0.label: read a book
LanguageData.VME_BookReading_Disliked.stages.0.descri: I hate reading. I was forced to read this book and hated every second of it.
LanguageData.VME_BookReading_Disliked.stages.0.label: read a book
LanguageData.VME_BookWriting_Disliked.stages.0.descri: I had to write a book. Putting your thoughts to paper is sinful and disgusting.
LanguageData.VME_BookWriting_Disliked.stages.0.label: wrote a book
LanguageData.VME_BookWriting_Exalted.stages.0.descrip: I did it! I am now a distinguished author.
LanguageData.VME_BookWriting_Exalted.stages.0.label: wrote a book
LanguageData.VME_Death_Troubling.stages.0.description: I know death is a part of life, but I just HATE being reminded of it.
LanguageData.VME_Death_Troubling.stages.0.label: death is troubling
LanguageData.VME_Defeat_Dishonorable.stages.0.descrip: I was defeated in combat, this brings me great dishonor.
LanguageData.VME_Defeat_Dishonorable.stages.0.label: defeated in combat
LanguageData.VME_SecondDefeat_Dishonorable.stages.0.d: I was defeated in combat again, my dishonor is immeasurable.
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Disliked.stages.0.descript: I had to do dumb labor. So exhausting!
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Disliked.stages.0.label: did dumb labor
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Exalted.stages.0.descripti: I had to do dumb labor. I am an excellent example of the working class.
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Exalted.stages.0.label: did dumb labor
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Horrible.stages.0.descript: I had to do dumb labor. It’s horrible. I don’t want it.
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Horrible.stages.0.label: did dumb labor
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Liked.stages.0.description: I had to do dumb labor. Broke a sweat but it was some honest work.
LanguageData.VME_DumbLabor_Liked.stages.0.label: did dumb labor
LanguageData.VME_Eclipse_Despised.stages.0.descriptio: Eclipses are so scary! Where did the light go?
LanguageData.VME_Eclipse_Despised.stages.0.label: disgusting eclipse
LanguageData.VME_Elders_Despised.stages.0.label: elder
LanguageData.VME_Elders_Despised.stages.1.label: youth
LanguageData.VME_Elders_Holy.stages.0.label: elder
LanguageData.VME_Elders_Respected.stages.0.label: elder
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.stages.0.description: It has been too long since I’ve seen a fire.
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.stages.0.label: no fires nearby
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.stages.1.description: I miss seeing the open flames.
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.stages.1.label: very few fires
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.stages.2.description: I recently saw a small fire.
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.stages.2.label: small fire
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.stages.3.description: I recently saw a burning flame.
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.stages.3.label: saw fire
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.stages.4.label: amazing fires
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.stages.5.description: I am surrounded by many beautiful flames. This is fine.
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Desired.stages.5.label: beautiful fires
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.stages.0.description: There are no fires nearby. That's good.
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.stages.0.label: no fires nearby
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.stages.1.description: Looking at those fires makes me uneasy.
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.stages.1.label: very few fires
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.stages.2.description: I recently saw a small fire. I'd rather see it extinguished.
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.stages.2.label: small fire
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.stages.3.description: I recently saw a burning flame. It makes me very uncomfortable!
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.stages.3.label: saw fire
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.stages.4.description: I am surrounded by fire! This is horrible!
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.stages.4.label: blazing fires
LanguageData.VME_Fire_Despised.stages.5.label: conflagration
LanguageData.VME_Firefighting_Abhorrent.stages.0.desc: I had to extinguish fire. What a violation of the spirits.
LanguageData.VME_Firefighting_Preferred.stages.0.desc: I extinguished a fire. What an exhilarating experience!
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.0.descripti: We lack a place to help people and should have a dedicated hospital.
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.0.label: need hospital
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.1.descripti: We have a hospital, but it is incredibly dirty. We are not animals!
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.1.label: dirty hospital
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.2.label: small hospital
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.3.descripti: We have a very spacious hospital.
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.3.label: spacious hospital
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.4.descripti: We have a huge, professional hospital!
LanguageData.VME_Hospital_Required.stages.4.label: huge hospital
LanguageData.VME_Illness_Exalted.stages.0.description: A holy virus and the godlike bacteria shall breed in my veins.
LanguageData.VME_Illness_Exalted.stages.0.label: sick
What I would give for the illness to bind me in pain once more.
LanguageData.VME_Illness_Preferred.stages.0.descripti: I am sick. A perfect excuse to lie down.
LanguageData.VME_Illness_Preferred.stages.0.label: sick
LanguageData.VME_AteInsectJellyDirect.stages.0.descri: I ate some insect jelly. Not bad.
LanguageData.VME_AteInsectJellyDirect.stages.0.label: ate insect jelly
Insect jelly is divine ambrosia, a gift from perfect creatures.
I ate some insect meat. This is an act of sacrilege, how could I do this?
LanguageData.VME_AteInsectMeatAsIngredient_Sacrilegio: I ate a meal that contained insect meat. This is an act of sacrilege, how could I do this?
LanguageData.VME_Insectoids_Despised.stages.0.descrip: I have killed an insectoid being, this is a victory!
LanguageData.VME_Insectoids_Despised.stages.0.label: insectoid slain
LanguageData.VME_Insectoids_Exalted.stages.0.descript: I have killed an insectoid being, this is a stain on my soul.
LanguageData.VME_Insectoids_Exalted.stages.0.label: insectoid slain
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.0.description: It has been too long since I’ve seen junk.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.0.label: no junk
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.1.description: This area is way too sparse, I miss seeing the junk.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.1.label: few pieces of ancient junk (1 nearby)
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.2.description: This area has very few relics of ancient technology.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.2.label: few pieces of ancient junk (2 nearby)
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.3.description: We need to gather more pieces of ancient junk.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.3.label: few pieces of ancient junk (3 nearby)
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.4.description: We have too few pieces of ancient junk lying around.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.4.label: few pieces of ancient junk (4 nearby)
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.5.description: We should gather at least a few more pieces. Our junkyard is lacking.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.5.label: very little junk (5 nearby)
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.6.description: I recently saw a small pile of junk.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.6.label: small junk
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.7.label: saw junk
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.8.label: amazing junk
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.9.description: I am surrounded by a junkyard and I love it.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Beautiful.stages.9.label: beautiful junk
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.0.description: I'd prefer if the colony had some examples of ancient junk.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.0.label: no junk
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.1.description: This area is way too sparse, we could learn a lot from ancient technology.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.1.label: few pieces of ancient junk (1 nearby)
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.2.description: This area has very few relics of ancient technology.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.2.label: few pieces of ancient junk (2 nearby)
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.3.description: We need to gather more pieces of ancient junk.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.3.label: few pieces of ancient junk (3 nearby)
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.4.description: We have too few pieces of ancient junk lying around.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.4.label: few pieces of ancient junk (4 nearby)
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.5.description: We should gather at least a few more pieces. We can learn a lot from ancient technology.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.5.label: very little junk (5 nearby)
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.6.description: I recently saw a small pile of junk.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.6.label: small junk
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.7.label: saw junk
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.8.label: plenty of junk
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.9.description: I am surrounded by a junkyard. I find these examples of ancient technology to be fascinating.
LanguageData.VME_Junk_Preferred.stages.9.label: lots of junk
LanguageData.VME_KillingWithFire_Abhorrent.stages.0.d: Our enemies burnt to death and we were unable to avoid their gruesome deaths.
LanguageData.VME_KillingWithFire_Preferred.stages.0.d: Our enemies burnt in the holy flames.
LanguageData.VME_Leader_Godlike.stages.0.label: supreme god emperor
LanguageData.VME_Leader_Godlike.stages.1.label: god emperor
LanguageData.VME_Leader_Godlike.stages.2.label: dubious divinity
LanguageData.VME_Leader_Godlike.stages.3.label: false god
LanguageData.VME_LeatherApparel_Abhorrent.stages.0.de: I'm wearing clothing made with animal leather. Slaughtering an animal to use its skin as apparel is cruel and inhumane.
LanguageData.VME_LeatherApparel_Disliked.stages.0.des: I'm wearing clothing made with animal leather. Slaughtering an animal to use its skin should be avoided.
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.stages.0.descriptio: We lack a place of knowledge.
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.stages.0.label: need library
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.stages.1.descriptio: We have a library, but it needs to be "decent" at least!
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.stages.1.label: lame library
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.stages.2.descriptio: We have a library, but it is incredibly dirty. We are not animals!
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.stages.2.label: dirty library
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.stages.3.label: small library
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.stages.4.descriptio: We have a very spacious library.
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.stages.4.label: spacious library
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.stages.5.descriptio: We have a huge, professional library!
LanguageData.VME_Library_Required.stages.5.label: huge library
LanguageData.VME_AteAnimalProducts_Abhorrent.stages.0: I had to eat animal products. It is wrong and immoral to imprison an animal and use it as a factory.
LanguageData.VME_Mechanoids_Despised.stages.0.descrip: I have destroyed a mechanoid being, this is a victory!
LanguageData.VME_Mechanoids_Despised.stages.0.label: mechanoid destroyed
LanguageData.VME_Mechanoids_Exalted.stages.0.descript: I have destroyed a mechanoid being, this will anger the gods.
LanguageData.VME_Mechanoids_Exalted.stages.0.label: mechanoid destroyed
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.0.descri: The astral architects smile upon me, their benevolence is unmatched.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.0.label: stars are aligned
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.1.descri: The stellar bodies above tell a story of imminent fortunes and success.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.1.label: stars are perfect
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.2.descri: The stars whisper to me, and they tell me to breathe easy. My fate is comfortably in their hands.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.2.label: stars are excellent
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.3.descri: Though small, the constellations tell me all is well for the time being.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.3.label: stars are good
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.4.descri: The stars whisper nonsense and contradictions, our destiny is increasingly unclear.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.4.label: stars are indifferent
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.5.descri: The skies do not bode well, an ill omen is on the horizon.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.5.label: stars are bad
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.6.descri: The sea of stars is ever cloudy, they shroud themselves from me and refuse to tell me of my fate.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.6.label: stars are not on my side
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.7.descri: The stellar bodies far above have made themselves clear, I am no longer in their favor.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.7.label: stars are a bad omen
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.8.descri: The planets have aligned, a syzygy has made clear my approaching demise is inescapable. I will shortly be reduced to mere dust.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_DictatedByStars.stages.8.label: stars are aligned… against me
LanguageData.VME_Mood_HighExpectations.stages.0.descr: I'm just generally having a good mood. The Rim is an amazing place.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_HighExpectations.stages.0.label: good mood
LanguageData.VME_Mood_LowExpectations.stages.0.descri: I'm just generally having a bad mood. The Rim is a hostile place.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_LowExpectations.stages.0.label: bad mood
LanguageData.VME_Mood_Shared.stages.0.description: Everyone is in good mood, as am I.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_Shared.stages.0.label: rejoice
LanguageData.VME_Mood_Shared.stages.1.description: Everyone is in bad mood, as am I.
LanguageData.VME_Mood_Shared.stages.1.label: grieve
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Desired.stages.0.desc: Our city is magnificent, a fine example of what humanity can achieve.
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Desired.stages.1.desc: We have so many beautiful buildings!
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Desired.stages.2.desc: We have so many beautiful buildings!
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Desired.stages.4.desc: There are not enough buildings nearby. I feel unprotected.
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Despised.stages.0.des: We have been here for too long. Perhaps it is time to leave.
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Despised.stages.1.des: We have been here for too long. Perhaps it is time to leave.
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Despised.stages.2.des: We have been here for too long. Perhaps it is time to leave.
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Despised.stages.3.des: This colony is trite. We should we wandering, not staying on the same place.
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Despised.stages.4.des: This colony is trite. We should we wandering, not staying on the same place.
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Despised.stages.5.des: Enough already! It is time to pack our things and hit the road.
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Despised.stages.6.des: Enough already! It is time to pack our things and hit the road.
LanguageData.VME_PermanentBases_Despised.stages.7.des: Agh! I can't stand being here anymore!
LanguageData.VME_Power_Desired.stages.0.description: I feel important and everyone looks up to me.
LanguageData.VME_Power_Desired.stages.0.label: in a position of power
LanguageData.VME_Power_Exalted.stages.0.description: My rule is supreme, for I am godlike.
LanguageData.VME_Power_Exalted.stages.0.label: divine rule
LanguageData.VME_Power_Preferred.stages.0.description: I hold a reasonable position of power and I like that feeling
LanguageData.VME_Power_Preferred.stages.0.label: i am important
I participated in a raid. How could we do that? It's horribly shameful!
I participated in a raid. Through conquest, we bring honor to our colony.
LanguageData.VME_RecentConquest_Abhorrent.stages.0.de: We recently raided another faction. This is horrible and brings shame to our colony.
LanguageData.VME_RecentConquest_Abhorrent.stages.1.de: It's been a long since we raided anyone. This is as it should be, we are not bullies.
LanguageData.VME_RecentConquest_Honorable.stages.0.de: We recently raided another faction. Through conquest, we bring honor to our colony.
LanguageData.VME_RecentConquest_Honorable.stages.1.de: It's been far too long since we raided anyone. Through conquest, we bring honor to our colony.
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Disliked.stages.0.descripti: We have no imprisoned animals. This is the way things should be.
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Disliked.stages.0.label: no pen markers around
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Disliked.stages.1.descripti: We have a pen marker in our colony. Animals are not our slaves and shouldn't be kept captive, it's immoral.
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Disliked.stages.1.label: pen marker around
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Disliked.stages.2.descripti: We have several pen markers in our colony. Animals are not our slaves and shouldn't be kept captive, it's immoral!
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Disliked.stages.2.label: pen markers around
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Disliked.stages.3.descripti: Our colony has too many pens, filled with poor animals in cramped conditions, bred for the slaughter. I'm disgusted.
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Disliked.stages.3.label: factory farming
LanguageData.VME_Ranching_Disliked_AttackedAnimal.sta: I had to attack an animal. They have rights too!
I sowed a human food plant. It's amazing, food free from cruelty and abuse.
LanguageData.VME_Recreation_Disapproved.stages.0.desc: Recreation is a waste of time.
LanguageData.VME_IdeoRole_FireKeeper.stages.0.label: keeper of sacred flame
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Disliked.stages.0.label: royalty
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.0.label: royalty: yeoman
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.1.label: royalty: acolyte
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.10.label: royalty: consul
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.11.label: royalty: magister
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.12.label: royalty: despot
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.13.label: royalty: stellarch
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.14.label: royalty: high stellarch
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.2.label: royalty: knight
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.3.label: royalty: praetor
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.4.label: royalty: baron
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.5.label: royalty: count
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.6.label: royalty: archcount
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.7.label: royalty: marquess
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.8.label: royalty: duke
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Exalted.stages.9.label: royalty: archduke
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.0.label: royalty: yeoman
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.1.label: royalty: acolyte
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.10.label: royalty: consul
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.11.label: royalty: magister
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.12.label: royalty: despot
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.13.label: royalty: stellarch
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.14.label: royalty: high stellarch
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.2.label: royalty: knight
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.3.label: royalty: praetor
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.4.label: royalty: baron
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.5.label: royalty: count
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.6.label: royalty: archcount
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.7.label: royalty: marquess
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.8.label: royalty: duke
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Hated.stages.9.label: royalty: archduke
LanguageData.VME_Royalty_Respected.stages.0.label: royalty
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Disgusting.stages.0.label: faintly scarred
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Disgusting.stages.1.label: scarred
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Disgusting.stages.2.label: heavily scarred
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Disgusting.stages.3.label: extremely scarred
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Disgusting.stages.4.label: innumerable battlefield scars
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Honorable.stages.0.label: faintly scarred
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Honorable.stages.1.label: scarred
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Honorable.stages.2.label: heavily scarred
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Honorable.stages.3.label: extremely scarred
LanguageData.VME_Scars_Honorable.stages.4.label: innumerable battlefield scars
LanguageData.VME_Slavery_Forbidden_SlavesInColony.sta: There are slaves in the colony. We should emancipate them as soon as possible.
LanguageData.VME_BoughtSlave_Know_Forbidden_Mood.stag: We have bought a slave from evil slave traders!
LanguageData.VME_SoldSlave_Know_Forbidden_Mood.stages: We took part in the horrible act of slave trading. What a disgrace.
LanguageData.VCE_AteChocolate_Craved.stages.0.label: ate chocolate (craved)
LanguageData.VCE_AteFineDessert_Craved.stages.0.descr: That dessert was really good! I want more!
LanguageData.VCE_AteFineDessert_Craved.stages.0.label: ate fine dessert (craved)
LanguageData.VCE_AteGourmetDessert_Craved.stages.0.de: Oh my God! My palate had never experienced such an explosion of orgasmic tastes. That was pure food porn. I need more!
LanguageData.VCE_AteLavishDessert_Craved.stages.0.des: That dessert was unbelievably good, I'm so eager to eat more of it!
LanguageData.VCE_AteSimpleDessert_Craved.stages.0.des: That dessert was very simple, but certainly tasty.
LanguageData.VME_TaintedApparel_Abhorrent.stages.0.de: I'm wearing clothing used by a dead person, I can't imagine anything more disgusting! Someone died wearing these!
LanguageData.VME_TatteredApparel_Abhorrent.stages.0.d: I'm wearing clothing that is tattered, and this is incredibly disgusting. Only the finest threads are worthy of my body.
LanguageData.VME_Trading_Required.stages.0.descriptio: As usual, our products are flying off the shelves.
LanguageData.VME_Trading_Required.stages.0.label: recently traded
LanguageData.VME_Trading_Required.stages.1.descriptio: No one wants to buy our product. I hope these quiet times will pass.
LanguageData.VME_Trading_Required.stages.1.label: no recent trades
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Desired.stages.0.description: There is nothing as exhilarating as seeing what the world has to offer.
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Desired.stages.0.label: traveled the world (less than 5 days ago)
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Desired.stages.1.description: Travelling is amazing. Seeing the sights, discovering new lands... The memories of my last travels are still fresh in my mind.
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Desired.stages.1.label: traveled the world (less than 10 days ago)
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Desired.stages.2.description: It's been a few days since I travelled. I loved it.
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Desired.stages.2.label: traveled the world (less than 15 days ago)
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Desired.stages.3.description: I have a fond memory of my past travels.
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Desired.stages.3.label: traveled the world (less than 60 days ago)
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Despised.stages.0.description: I despise travelling. Leaving the security of our colony is terrible.
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Despised.stages.0.label: had to leave the colony (less than 5 days ago)
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Despised.stages.1.description: The memories of my last travels are still fresh in my mind. I hated it.
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Despised.stages.1.label: had to leave the colony (less than 10 days ago)
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Despised.stages.2.description: It's been a few days since I travelled. I hated it.
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Despised.stages.2.label: had to leave the colony (less than 15 days ago)
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Despised.stages.3.description: I have uncomfortable memories of my past travels.
LanguageData.VME_Travel_Despised.stages.3.label: had to leave the colony (less than 60 days ago)
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Abhorrent.stages.0.descript: I have used deadly force on an adversary. It brings great shame.
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Abhorrent.stages.0.label: attacked person
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Disapproved.stages.0.descri: I have used deadly force on an adversary. This is wrong.
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Disapproved.stages.0.label: attacked person
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Honorable.stages.0.descript: I have used deadly force on an adversary. This proves our strength and our resolve.
LanguageData.VME_Violence_Honorable.stages.0.label: attacked person
LanguageData.VME_GloriousBonfire.stages.0.description: It was super fun and we really connected with each other with the shared experience.
LanguageData.VME_GloriousBonfire.stages.0.label: glorious bonfire
LanguageData.VME_GoodBonfire.stages.0.description: The flames rose and crackled majestically over the settlement, and it lifted all our spirits considerably.
LanguageData.VME_GoodBonfire.stages.0.label: good bonfire
LanguageData.VME_LacklusterBonfire.stages.0.descripti: We were expecting a wondrous conflagration, and instead we got an oversized campfire. At least it was kinda entertaining.
LanguageData.VME_LacklusterBonfire.stages.0.label: lackluster bonfire
LanguageData.VME_TerribleBonfire.stages.0.description: Some pathetic little flames drifted around, and they went away too soon. "Bon" fire? More like "Lame" fire.
LanguageData.VME_TerribleBonfire.stages.0.label: terrible bonfire
LanguageData.VME_BoringCeremonialSuicide.stages.0.des: That ceremonial suicide was not good. The speech seemed forced. At the very least we have restored the honor of our colony.
A honorable ceremonial suicide. The shadow of defeat no longer clouds our minds.
LanguageData.VME_TerribleCeremonialSuicide.stages.0.d: That ceremonial suicide was terrible. The blade was thrust laterally and there was blood and entrails everywhere. Disgusting!
LanguageData.VME_UnforgettableCeremonialSuicide.stage: That ceremonial suicide was unforgettable! Everyone will remember the courage, self-control, and strong resolve. The honor of our colony is now spotless.
LanguageData.VME_AccursedIncantation.stages.0.descrip: A litany of dark morbidities expressed in crime, perversion, and insanity.
LanguageData.VME_AccursedIncantation.stages.0.label: accursed incantation
LanguageData.VME_BlasphemousIncantation.stages.0.desc: A promise of hidden and fathomless worlds of strange life which pulsate in the gulfs beyond the stars and press hideously upon our own globe in unholy dimensions which only the dead and the moonstruck can glimpse.
LanguageData.VME_LoathsomeIncantation.stages.0.descri: We live on a placid island of ignorance in the midst of black seas of infinity, and it was not meant that we should voyage far.
LanguageData.VME_LoathsomeIncantation.stages.0.label: loathsome incantation
LanguageData.VME_SquamousIncantation.stages.0.descrip: An indescribably hideous gibbering! I'd even describe it as squamous, but I don't even know what that is! An unutterable word!
LanguageData.VME_SquamousIncantation.stages.0.label: squamous incantation
LanguageData.VME_AwkwardInsectoidHymn.stages.0.descri: The speech was repetitive, and it did nothing to convince me of the divinity of our beloved insects.
LanguageData.VME_AwkwardInsectoidHymn.stages.0.label: awkward insectoid hymn
LanguageData.VME_EntrancingInsectoidHymn.stages.0.des: I can still hear the mesmerizing words of the hymn, like a myriad insectile legs crawling all over our bodies.
LanguageData.VME_RousingInsectoidHymn.stages.0.descri: The chanter showed impressing skill and the hymn appropriately extolled the virtues of our way of life.
LanguageData.VME_RousingInsectoidHymn.stages.0.label: rousing insectoid hymn
What an incredibly uninteresting ritual. Yeah, yeah, insects are cool. Bah.
LanguageData.VME_BoringLeadershipChallenge.stages.0.d: That leadership challenge was not good. The fighters wouldn't commit, so there were no exciting moments. At least our leader is the strongest.
LanguageData.VME_GoodLeadershipChallenge.stages.0.des: A good leadership challenge. The fighters went for blood and showed real heart. We now know that our leader is the strongest.
LanguageData.VME_TerribleLeadershipChallenge.stages.0: That leadership challenge was terrible. Watching it just made people sad. I guess we have a strong leader, at least...
LanguageData.VME_UnforgettableLeadershipChallenge.sta: That leadership challenge was unforgettable! Both fighters gave all they had, and we know that our leader is now the strongest among us!
LanguageData.VME_AttendedParty.stages.0.description: I had a good time at that party.
LanguageData.VME_AttendedParty.stages.0.label: attended superb party
LanguageData.VME_EnforcedCompliance.stages.0.descript: Someone was executed for the lack of compliance. I need to be positive. I NEED TO.
LanguageData.VME_EnforcedCompliance.stages.0.label: compliant
LanguageData.VME_AwkwardOrgy.stages.0.description: Everyone sat around not knowing exactly what to do, naked bodies laying everywhere. Quite disappointing.
LanguageData.VME_AwkwardOrgy.stages.0.label: awkward orgy
LanguageData.VME_ExhilaratingOrgy.stages.0.descriptio: We all donned our high-society masquerade masks and got naked. A barrage of orgasmic sexual ecstasy unlike no other made our bodies tremble with barely concealed excitement.
LanguageData.VME_ExhilaratingOrgy.stages.0.label: exhilarating orgy
LanguageData.VME_GotSomeLovin.stages.0.description: There's nothing like a tumble between the sheets to lift the mood.
LanguageData.VME_GotSomeLovin.stages.0.label: got some lovin'
LanguageData.VME_GrotesqueOrgy.stages.0.description: When you think of an orgy, you tend to imagine attractive people. This was... the entire opposite. The mental images will take a while to go away.
LanguageData.VME_GrotesqueOrgy.stages.0.label: grotesque orgy
LanguageData.VME_SexyOrgy.stages.0.description: We gave ourselves to each other in a communal expression of our deepest passions.
LanguageData.VME_SexyOrgy.stages.0.label: sexy orgy
LanguageData.VME_BoringPlagueFestival.stages.0.descri: That plague festival was repetitive and the killing technique was noticeably flawed. However the blessed plague is now among us.
LanguageData.VME_BoringPlagueFestival.stages.0.label: boring plague festival
LanguageData.VME_SatisfyingPlagueFestival.stages.0.de: That plague festival was satisfying and a holy miasma was liberated from the corpse, bathing us all in a sacred plague wind.
LanguageData.VME_SpectacularPlagueFestival.stages.0.d: The blood! The release! That plague festival brought everyone to the edge of a frenzy and a sacred plague wind wafted from the animal's corpse, blessing us.
LanguageData.VME_TerriblePlagueFestival.stages.0.desc: That plague festival was botched and the mood was way off. The corpse laid there, inert, and no holy miasma was liberated from it. What a waste of time!
LanguageData.VME_NeedAnonymity.stages.0.description: They know everything, I’m an open book, entirely vulnerable and without a shred of nuance.
LanguageData.VME_NeedAnonymity.stages.0.label: anonymity violated
LanguageData.VME_NeedAnonymity.stages.1.description: My identity has been deeply compromised, I’m so ashamed by the attention I’ve garnered for myself.
LanguageData.VME_NeedAnonymity.stages.1.label: anonymity compromised
LanguageData.VME_NeedAnonymity.stages.2.description: This can’t be allowed to continue, if I keep this behavior up I’ll be exposed.
LanguageData.VME_NeedAnonymity.stages.2.label: anonymity threatened
LanguageData.VME_NeedAnonymity.stages.3.description: I feel so much more comfortable like this. I don’t even think they know my name or face.
LanguageData.VME_NeedAnonymity.stages.3.label: completely anonymous
LanguageData.VME_NeedSweets.stages.0.description: I'm craving some sweet food badly... I feel so tired... this is ridiculous, I’d do just about anything for a single sprinkle.
LanguageData.VME_NeedSweets.stages.0.label: craving dessert
LanguageData.VME_NeedSweets.stages.1.description: I haven't had a sweet treat in a while now. Is a chocolate bar or piece of cake too much to ask for?
LanguageData.VME_NeedSweets.stages.1.label: desiring dessert
LanguageData.VME_NeedSweets.stages.2.description: How about some dessert? It has been a while...
LanguageData.VME_NeedSweets.stages.2.label: wanting dessert
LanguageData.VME_NeedSweets.stages.3.description: I've recently eaten some dessert, it was amazing.
LanguageData.VME_NeedSweets.stages.3.label: full
LanguageData.VME_NeedSweets.stages.4.description: I'm in heaven. Sweet, greasy, delicious heaven.
LanguageData.VME_NeedSweets.stages.4.label: completely full
LanguageData.VME_AmazingSlaveEmancipation.stages.0.de: Legends will be told about our leader's speech, and how those words will resonate in the future, elevating the cause of emancipation.
We ended up looking as the evil guys here... With such a display, it's unlikely anyone will freely want to join the colony.
LanguageData.VME_FreethinkingSlaveEmancipation.stages: Our leader's speech was clear and succint, explaining all the evils of slavery in a concise way.
LanguageData.VME_LiberatingSlaveEmancipation.stages.0: Our leader's speech was a masterclass in extolling the virtues of a free society, liberated for the shackles of slavery.
Our leader's speech was very inspiring, detailing all the evils caused by slavery and the immense advantages of a free society.
LanguageData.VME_CheapTradingFair.stages.0.descriptio: We tried to organize a trading fair without spending any money on it. It is shameful to be so cheap.
LanguageData.VME_CheapTradingFair.stages.0.label: we tried to be cheap
With such a low quality effort, no additional caravans will be attracted to our settlement...
LanguageData.VME_UnexcitingTradingFair.stages.0.descr: Some exciting transactions took place, but the majority of it was boring business talk.
LanguageData.VME_UnexcitingTradingFair.stages.0.label: unexciting trading fair
LanguageData.VME_WellOrganizedTradingFair.stages.0.de: There was a lot of back and forth and networking.
LanguageData.VME_WondrousTradingFair.stages.0.descrip: We discussed exciting and innovative economical paradigms, and our settlement will be renowned as a center of finance learning.
LanguageData.VME_WondrousTradingFair.stages.0.label: wondrous trading fair
LanguageData.VME_AwkwardViolentConversion.stages.0.de: That violent conversion was awkward. The words were vague and unconvincing.
LanguageData.VME_SatisfyingViolentConversion.stages.0: That violent conversion was satisfying. The speech was stirring and enjoyable to listen to.
That violent conversion was electrifying! Surely our beliefs will prevail over any others!
LanguageData.VME_GloriousWickerManBurning.stages.0.de: We will forever remember the thrashing of the prisoner, the frightened crescendo of screams as another soul was consumed by the holy flames.
LanguageData.VME_GoodWickerManBurning.stages.0.descri: The anguished cries of the prisoner will resonate with us for a long time, another soul consumed by the flames.
LanguageData.VME_GoodWickerManBurning.stages.0.label: good wicker man burning
The prisoner just burned to death too fast, and the fire didn't even lift our spirits much.
LanguageData.VME_TerribleWickerManBurning.stages.0.de: The whole ritual smelled like rotten bacon. And, inexplicably the prisoner kept shouting "No! Not the bees!". What was that all about?
LanguageData.GR_ElectroEggHigh.stages.0.description: Swallowing that mechanoid egg made me feel great. I can almost feel the mechanites in my stomach!
LanguageData.GR_ElectroEggHigh.stages.0.label: active mechanites
LanguageData.GR_ElectroEggWithdrawal.stages.1.descrip: All my body itches... It is as if the mechanites are turning against me.
LanguageData.GR_ElectroEggWithdrawal.stages.1.label: active mechanites withdrawal
LanguageData.GR_FeatherdustHigh.stages.0.description: I just smoked ground feathers from a scientific abomination and... I feel fine.
LanguageData.GR_FeatherdustHigh.stages.0.label: high on featherdust
LanguageData.GR_FeatherdustWithdrawal.stages.1.descri: I really wish I could smoke.
LanguageData.GR_FeatherdustWithdrawal.stages.1.label: featherdust withdrawal
Are we really using automated turrets? When we have the very power of creation in our fingertips? That's so lame.
LanguageData.GR_Failures_Disliked.stages.0.descriptio: One of our genetics experiments failed. We should get rid of it as soon as possible.
LanguageData.GR_Failures_Disliked.stages.0.label: genetic failures
LanguageData.GR_Failures_Shameful.stages.0.descriptio: One of our genetics experiments failed, and a misshapen monstrosity is running around uncheked. We should get rid of it as soon as possible, for this shames us.
LanguageData.GR_Failures_Shameful.stages.0.label: genetic failures
LanguageData.GR_HumanoidHybrids_Disliked.stages.0.des: There are humanoid hybrids running around. This is ethically troubling.
LanguageData.GR_HumanoidHybrids_Forbidden.stages.0.de: There are humanoid hybrids running around. This is horrible, an abolute perversion of science.
LanguageData.GR_DamnMammaries.stages.0.description: I'm being milked like an animal! This is really deeply humilliating!
LanguageData.GR_DamnMammaries.stages.0.label: feeling like a fat cow
LanguageData.GR_HeWearsAntennae.stages.0.description: So much information! Make it stop!
LanguageData.GR_HeWearsAntennae.stages.0.label: wearing insectoid antennae
LanguageData.GR_WearingBunnyEars.stages.0.label: wearing bunny ears
LanguageData.GR_WearingThrumboHorn.stages.0.label: wearing thrumbo horn
LanguageData.GR_AteRatMilk.stages.0.description: Did I just drink rat milk? It can't be, can it?
LanguageData.GR_AteRatMilk.stages.0.label: what was that milk?
LanguageData.RB_AteGeneticHoney.stages.0.description: That genetic honey has given me a boost of strength. I feel good.
LanguageData.RB_AteGeneticHoney.stages.0.label: ate genetic honey
LanguageData.RB_AteGeneticHoneyIngredient.stages.0.de: The genetic honey that meal was made with has given me a boost of strength. I feel good.
LanguageData.AA_BeenPsionicallyNuzzled.stages.0.descr: That pretty fox sure seems to know how to make you feel loved...
LanguageData.AA_BeenPsionicallyNuzzled.stages.0.label: psionically nuzzled
LanguageData.GR_BunnyAround.stages.0.description: *faint sobs* that's the cutest thing I've ever seen
LanguageData.GR_BunnyAround.stages.0.label: cute catrabbit
LanguageData.GR_DisgustingUwuchat.stages.0.descriptio: I feel so dirty... what a disgusting experience
LanguageData.GR_DisgustingUwuchat.stages.0.label: intense cringe
LanguageData.GR_EngagedByHumanoidMood.stages.0.descri: That was such an interesting conversation! What a nice creature!
LanguageData.GR_EngagedByHumanoidMood.stages.0.label: kind conversation with humanoid hybrid
LanguageData.GR_InsultedByHumanoidMood.stages.0.descr: I've been directly insulted by a genetic abomination! What an awful creature!
LanguageData.GR_InsultedByHumanoidMood.stages.0.label: insulted by humanoid hybrid
LanguageData.GR_Uwuchat.stages.0.description: That was weird. Am I a degenerate?
LanguageData.GR_Uwuchat.stages.0.label: uwu pounced
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.0.label: bliss
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.1.description: I think things are getting better.
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.1.label: bliss
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.2.description: Everything is improving, slowly but surely.
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.2.label: bliss
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.3.description: I'm feeling good right now, things are looking up.
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.3.label: bliss
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.4.description: I feel warm and fuzzy, just being alive feels great.
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.4.label: bliss
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.5.description: I'm just about to burst with excitement. I love this colony, I love this world and all the lives on it.
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.5.label: bliss
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.6.description: All the colors of this world are so vivid, the sounds are so tranquil, the air is so crisp. This life leaves me breathless.
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.6.label: bliss
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.7.description: This is it, isn't it? I've truly reached nirvana itself. Life itself is the very embodiment of happiness.
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.stages.7.label: bliss
LanguageData.VPE_Future.stages.0.description: I know my future, and things are looking good!
LanguageData.VPE_Future.stages.0.label: i know my future!
LanguageData.VPE_MindWiped.stages.0.description: I don’t remember anything, I’m exploring everything anew!
LanguageData.VPE_MindWiped.stages.0.label: mind wiped
LanguageData.VPE_Thrall.stages.0.label: thrall
LanguageData.VPE_TimeQuake.stages.0.description: Everyone I knew has changed so much. This timequake really did a number on me.
LanguageData.VPE_TimeQuake.stages.0.label: time quake
LanguageData.VAERoy_TutorDied.stages.0.description: That lovely orungatun taught me a lot. This universe is evil!
LanguageData.VAERoy_TutorDied.stages.0.label: tutoring animal {0} died
LanguageData.VAERoy_TutorKilled.stages.0.label: killed my tutoring animal
LanguageData.VAERoy_TutorLost.stages.0.description: That lovely orungatun taught me a lot. This universe is evil!
LanguageData.VAERoy_TutorLost.stages.0.label: tutoring animal {0} lost
LanguageData.VAERoy_CraneThought.stages.0.description: My royal gardens are full of the most noble of birds.
LanguageData.VAERoy_CraneThought.stages.0.label: beautiful cranes
LanguageData.VFEE_Chosen.stages.0.label: chosen
LanguageData.VFEE_FirstOfName.stages.0.label: first of {otherpawn_possessive} name
LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.stages.0.description: I am the recipient of the Great honor.
LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.stages.0.label: great honor
LanguageData.VFEE_AmazingBall.stages.0.description: I had such an amazing time at that ball. It was everything I imagined and more!
LanguageData.VFEE_AmazingBall.stages.0.label: amazing ball
LanguageData.VFEE_AmazingExhibit.stages.0.description: I couldn't believe art I've seen many times could still be soo fascinating, and the royals were so interesting.
LanguageData.VFEE_AmazingExhibit.stages.0.label: amazing exhibit
LanguageData.VFEE_BoringBall.stages.0.description: I was expecting a grand time. What I got was seriously lacking.
LanguageData.VFEE_BoringBall.stages.0.label: boring ball
LanguageData.VFEE_BoringExhibit.stages.0.description: I was expecting a a lot more interesting pieces, and better presentation.
LanguageData.VFEE_BoringExhibit.stages.0.label: boring exhibit
LanguageData.VFEE_EnjoyableBall.stages.0.description: I had a great time dancing in that ball!
LanguageData.VFEE_EnjoyableBall.stages.0.label: enjoyable ball
LanguageData.VFEE_EnjoyableExhibit.stages.0.descripti: It was really interesting seeing our collection displayed like this. Was a great time!
LanguageData.VFEE_EnjoyableExhibit.stages.0.label: enjoyable exhibit
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleBall.stages.0.description: I'm embarrassed to be a part of that train wreck. I just hope no one gossips about this.
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleBall.stages.0.label: terrible ball
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.0.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be resepected in the empire now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.0.label: terrible exhibit
LanguageData.VFEE_BadVisit.stages.0.description: I had a terrible time with that host.
LanguageData.VFEE_BadVisit.stages.0.label: terrible visit
LanguageData.VFEE_LackingNobleCourt.stages.0.descript: My noble court is lacking. My title’s formal requirements should always be respected. I demand to be surrounded by: \n\n{0}
LanguageData.VFEE_LackingNobleCourt.stages.0.label: lacking noble court
LanguageData.VFEE_TitleBallroomRequirementsNotMet.sta: I am {TITLE_indefinite} and I should have these items in my ballroom:\n\n{0}
LanguageData.VFEE_TitleGalleryRequirementsNotMet.stag: I am {TITLE_indefinite} and I should have these items in my gallery:\n\n{0}
LanguageData.VFEE_TitleNoBallroom.stages.0.descriptio: What is a royal without a ballroom?
LanguageData.VFEE_TitleNoBallroom.stages.0.label: no ballroom
LanguageData.VFEE_TitleNoGallery.stages.0.description: What is a royal without a royal gallery?
LanguageData.VFEE_TitleNoGallery.stages.0.label: no gallery
LanguageData.GenerousSlotmachine.stages.0.description: Feels like the slot machine is very generous today.
LanguageData.GenerousSlotmachine.stages.0.label: generous slotmachine
LanguageData.HC_WonSlotMachineGame.stages.0.descripti: I had some luck on the pokies!
LanguageData.HC_WonSlotMachineGame.stages.0.label: won a game of slots
LanguageData.RiggedSlotmachine.stages.0.description: I think the slot machine is rigged.
LanguageData.RiggedSlotmachine.stages.0.label: rigged slotmachine
LanguageData.Storefront_Serviced.stages.0.label: awful service
LanguageData.Storefront_Serviced.stages.1.label: bad service
LanguageData.Storefront_Serviced.stages.2.label: decent service

LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.0.descript: I had to clean imperial propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it’s not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.0.label: cleaned propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.0.descriptio: We will show the Empire what freedom means.
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.0.label: joined the deserters
LanguageData.VFED_UsedDeclassifier.stages.0.label: used a declassifier

LanguageData.VVE_FeelingClassyInCar.stages.0.label: feeling classy
LanguageData.VFET_NoExpectations.stages.0.label: no expectations
LanguageData.VFET_Encouraging.stages.0.description: Hey, some of those ideas were pretty great! I think we are unto something here.
LanguageData.VFET_Encouraging.stages.0.label: encouraging tribal gathering
LanguageData.VFET_Ineffective.stages.0.description: We tried to discuss some new developments in the tribe, but it devolved into petty bickering about food and shelter...
LanguageData.VFET_Ineffective.stages.0.label: ineffective tribal gathering
LanguageData.VFET_Inspiring.stages.0.description: We are close to a breakthrough, I can feel it!
LanguageData.VFET_Inspiring.stages.0.label: inspiring tribal gathering
LanguageData.VFET_Uninspiring.stages.0.description: There were some new ideas floating around, but not much of substance. At least it was kinda entertaining.
LanguageData.VFET_Uninspiring.stages.0.label: uninspiring tribal gathering
LanguageData.Spaceports_PsychicCharge.stages.0.descri: The scream from that shuttle's charge... it keeps echoing, piercing and prickling at the inside of my skull.
LanguageData.Spaceports_PsychicCharge.stages.0.label: psychic charge echo
LanguageData.VAE_WitnessedFleshShaping.stages.0.descr: A bit shocking, to say the least.
LanguageData.VAE_WitnessedFleshShaping.stages.0.label: witnessed flesh shaping
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChips.stages.0.label: ate potato chips
LanguageData.AM_Softdrink.stages.0.description: That sugary taste can make me happy all day long.
LanguageData.AM_Softdrink.stages.0.label: drank soft drink
LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.0.description: I know this is not a haute cuisine restaurant, but it is terrible to eat the same thing every single day!
LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.0.label: terrible food variety
LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.1.description: We have a very varied and rich diet, it's amazing!
LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.1.label: amazing food variety
LanguageData.VQE_ARCGenerators_Abhorrent_ARCLevel.sta: Our colony has the ARC. It’s outrageous. I hate it.
LanguageData.VQE_ARCGenerators_Abhorrent_StudiedARC.s: I possess the forbidden knowledge I’d rather not have.
LanguageData.VQE_ARCGenerators_Exalted_ARCLevel.stage: Our colony has the ARC. It’s beautiful. It sings.
LanguageData.VQE_ARCGenerators_Exalted_StudiedARC.sta: I possess the knowledge to construct the advanced reactor chambers.
LanguageData.VQE_Technology_Rejected_WearingTech.stag: I’m wearing equipment of the future. I hate technology.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Inebriated.stages.0.description: I just feel a bit more relaxed after that drink. That's good.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Inebriated.stages.0.label: alcohol warmth
LanguageData.VFEM2_Inebriated.stages.1.description: I'm a bit wobbly! And this is quite enjoyable.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Inebriated.stages.1.label: quite inebriated
LanguageData.VFEM2_Inebriated.stages.2.description: I feel so uninhibited and unafraid! This is a great time!
LanguageData.VFEM2_Inebriated.stages.2.label: drunk
LanguageData.VFEM2_Inebriated.stages.3.label: hammered
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Awful.stages.0.descripti: I can't believe I just drank that. The sour taste still lingers, and my stomach feels unsettled. What was that supposed to be, vinegar?
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Awful.stages.0.label: drank awful wine
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Excellent.stages.0.descr: Now this is what wine is supposed to taste like! Each sip is a delight. I feel my mind clearing, and everything seems just a little more vibrant.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Excellent.stages.0.label: drank excellent wine
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Good.stages.0.descriptio: Ah, this wine is quite pleasant. The flavors blend nicely, and I can feel a comfortable buzz setting in.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Good.stages.0.label: drank good wine
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Legendary.stages.0.descr: I've never tasted anything like this before. It’s as though the very essence of joy has been captured in liquid form.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Legendary.stages.0.label: drank legendary wine
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Masterwork.stages.0.desc: Absolutely exquisite. The depth of flavor is extraordinary, and I can feel my body relaxing, as if every worry is drifting away.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Normal.stages.0.descript: This is passable. It doesn’t excite the senses, but it’s smooth enough to enjoy.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Normal.stages.0.label: drank wine
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Poor.stages.0.descriptio: Not the best I’ve had. It’s bitter and barely drinkable. I guess it'll do if nothing else is around, but I can feel a headache coming on already.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DrankWine_Poor.stages.0.label: drank poor wine
LanguageData.VFEM2_TorturerDraught.stages.0.descripti: This wicked concoction set my insides on fire! It hurts all over!
LanguageData.VFEM2_TorturerDraught.stages.0.label: twisting pain
LanguageData.VFEM2_StingMoodDebuff.stages.0.descripti: I was stung, and it hurt!
LanguageData.VFEM2_StingMoodDebuff.stages.0.label: stung by bees
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClarityDraught.stages.0.descriptio: My mind is racing. I can’t stop all the thoughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClarityDraught.stages.0.label: clarity buzz
LanguageData.VCE_AteHauteMeal.stages.0.description: A transcendent encounter with flavor. Every delicate note of the meal unfolds like a masterpiece, elevating my senses to realms of pure culinary artistry.
LanguageData.VCE_AteHauteMeal.stages.0.label: ate haute meal
LanguageData.VCE_AteHauteMeal_Five.stages.0.descripti: A transcendent encounter with flavor. Every delicate note of the meal unfolds like a masterpiece, elevating my senses to realms of pure culinary artistry.
LanguageData.VCE_AteHauteMeal_Five.stages.0.label: ate haute meal
LanguageData.VCE_AteHauteMeal_Four.stages.0.descripti: A transcendent encounter with flavor. Every delicate note of the meal unfolds like a masterpiece, elevating my senses to realms of pure culinary artistry.
LanguageData.VCE_AteHauteMeal_Four.stages.0.label: ate haute meal
cooked a haute meal for me
LanguageData.VCE_AteHauteMeal_Social_Sharing.stages.0: shared the dining experience with me
LanguageData.VCE_AteHauteMeal_Three.stages.0.descript: A transcendent encounter with flavor. Every delicate note of the meal unfolds like a masterpiece, elevating my senses to realms of pure culinary artistry.
LanguageData.VCE_AteHauteMeal_Three.stages.0.label: ate haute meal

LanguageData.VCE_AteHauteMeal_Two.stages.0.label: ate haute meal
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.0.description: I keep thinking about what happened. Maybe I could have done something differently.
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.0.label: lingering guilt
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.1.description: The weight of my past decisions is sinking in. I feel uneasy, like I failed those who counted on me.
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.1.label: growing remorse
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.2.description: I should have done more. Their voices echo in my mind, reminding me of what I’ve lost.
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.2.label: deep regret
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.3.description: Every moment, I feel the burden of my failure. It’s like a sickness, gnawing away at me.
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.3.label: crushing guilt
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.4.description: I can barely function under the weight of my grief. I see their faces in every shadow.
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.4.label: tormenting sorrow
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.5.description: There’s no escape from this agony. I am the last, and I don't deserve to be.
LanguageData.VQE_Guilt.stages.5.label: despairing isolation
